SRX.Foci.limitHint: Active foci / safe limit (Willpower ÷ 2). Going over is allowed but costs Liability on all resistance & Drain tests and 1 unresisted Stun/hour per focus over.
SRX.Foci.overLimitHint: Over the safe active-focus limit — resistance & Drain tests take Liability, and 1 unresisted Stun/hour per focus over.
SRX.Foci.bondHint: Bond this focus (Force hours of contemplation) so it can be activated.
SRX.Foci.bondFirst: Bond this focus before it can be activated.
